# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Set the maintainer label
LABEL maintainer="your_email@example.com"

# Update package list and install required packages
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip curl wget git vim && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy application files into the container
COPY . /app

# Install Python dependencies
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Expose necessary ports (if any)
EXPOSE 5000

# Command to run the application
CMD ["python3", "app.py"]
